ques: Search for papers related to 'climate change modeling' on ArXiv and find out how many have been published in the Earth and Planetary Astrophysics (astro-ph.EP) category in the last month.
answer: 0 — No papers matching "climate change modeling" were published in the astro-ph.EP (Earth and Planetary Astrophysics) category in the last month (2026-05-26 to 2026-06-26). The most recent matching paper dates to March 2026; there are 25 such papers across all dates.
